title: Bridge Essay: Neural correlates and dynamical brain states of creative insight in a spatial pr

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Neural, correlates, and, dynamical, brain.

**Neural correlates and dynamical brain states of creative insight in aspatial problem task.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 40753262. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-025-13684-y. Insight problem-solving is acreative cognitive process that involves overcoming mental impasses and discovering novel solutions. However, the neural mechanisms underlying insight, particularly in spatial manipulation task remain poorly understood. In this study, we investigated the brain dynamics involved in solving matchstick arithmetic problems, atype of spatial insight problem, using functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI).
